title: Trump calls off planned Iran strike at Gulf allies' request — Qatar, Saudi, UAE leaders asked for 2-3 day delay
snippet: President Trump announced he has postponed a planned U.S. military strike on Iran at the request of key Gulf allies — the Emir of Qatar Sheikh Tamim, Saudi Crown Prince Mohammed bin Salman, and UAE President Mohamed bin Zayed — who said serious negotiations could produce a deal 'very acceptable' to the US. Trump ordered Hegseth and Caine to stand down but instructed the military to remain ready for a 'full, large scale assault of Iran, on a moment's notice' if negotiations fail. Trump said he had planned 'a very major attack' but put it off 'for a little while, hopefully, maybe forever.'
tag_reason: 신규 — 트럼프의 이란 공습 보류 결정은 이전 보도된 5/19 NSC 군사회의(src-1143)의 후속이나 결과가 정반대(공격→보류)인 전환적 사건

entities.name: Sheikh Tamim bin Hamad Al Thani
